steps.title: Use the breakage clue
steps.content: The passage explains that noses are delicate and stick out from the rest of a sculpture, making them especially easy to break.

steps.title: Reject unrelated qualities
steps.content:
• Choice A: Recognizable describes identifiability, not ease of breaking.
  • Choice C: Common describes frequency, not physical vulnerability.
  • Choice D: Sophisticated describes refinement, not delicacy.

steps.title: Choose the vulnerability word
steps.content: The word needed is the one that means easily damaged or broken, matching delicate and easy to break. The answer is B.
